Off Calendar Jul-07-2025 Off Calendar

DEMURRER to COMPLAINT
Off Calendar May-15-2025 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Appearances (by Zoom):
Jon Paul Moorehead, Esq. 510-834-3600 Law offices of Richard Meier for Plaintiff.
Chad Couchot, Esq. 916-567-0400 Schuering Zimmerman & Doyle for Defendant.

ARGUED. The Court having reviewed the pleadings and having heard oral argument rules as follows:

The Court adopts the tentative ruling.

DEFENDANT DAVID WONG DEMURRER to COMPLAINT.

Defendants' Demurrer to Complaint is sustained in part and overruled in part.

(see word minutes for full details)

Order is signed.

Judge: Joseph M. Quinn, Clerk: M. Goodman, Not Reported. (302/JMQ)
